    檢查指定服務端點的健康狀態

classes.name: CaseExtractor
classes.docstring:
Extracts historical cases from memory for Few-shot learning.

    Works with the mem0-based memory system to find relevant cases
    and convert them to the Case format.

classes.name: FewShotLearner
classes.docstring:
Few-shot learning system for enhancing AI decision-making.

    Uses historical cases to provide relevant examples that improve
    the quality of AI-generated plans and decisions.

classes.name: SimilarityCalculator
classes.docstring:
Calculator for case similarity.

    Supports:
    - Semantic similarity using embeddings (cosine similarity)
    - Structural similarity using affected systems (Jaccard similarity)
    - Combine

classes.name: CaseOutcome
classes.docstring: Outcome of a historical case.

classes.name: CaseCategory
classes.docstring: Category of case for organization.

classes.name: CaseMetadata
classes.docstring: Metadata for a case.

classes.name: Case
classes.docstring: A historical case used for Few-shot learning.

classes.name: SimilarityResult
classes.docstring: Result of similarity calculation.

classes.name: LearningResult
classes.docstring: Result of Few-shot learning enhancement.

classes.name: LearningEffectiveness
classes.docstring: Tracking of learning effectiveness.

classes.name: LearningConfig
classes.docstring: Configuration for the Few-shot learning system.

classes.name: DecisionTracker
classes.docstring:
Tracks and audits AI decisions.

    Provides complete audit trail with:
    - Decision context and input
    - Thinking process (Extended Thinking output)
    - Selected action and alternatives

classes.name: AuditReportGenerator
classes.docstring:
Generates explanatory reports for audited decisions.

    Creates human-readable reports that explain:
    - What decision was made and why
    - What alternatives were considered
    - What risk

classes.name: DecisionType
classes.docstring: Type of decision made.

classes.name: DecisionOutcome
classes.docstring: Outcome of a decision.

classes.name: QualityRating
classes.docstring: Quality rating for a decision.

classes.name: DecisionContext
classes.docstring: Context in which a decision was made.

classes.name: ThinkingProcess
classes.docstring: Record of the AI's thinking process.

classes.name: AlternativeConsidered
classes.docstring: An alternative that was considered but not selected.

classes.name: DecisionAudit
classes.docstring: Complete audit record for a decision.

classes.name: AuditReport
classes.docstring: Explanatory report for a decision.

classes.name: AuditQuery
classes.docstring: Query parameters for searching audit records.

classes.name: AuditConfig
classes.docstring: Configuration for the audit system.

classes.name: AgentDiscoveryService
classes.docstring:
Service for agent registration and discovery.

    Manages:
    - Agent registration and unregistration
    - Agent capability querying
    - Agent discovery based on requirements
    - Heartbeat

classes.name: MessageType
classes.docstring: Types of A2A messages.

classes.name: MessageStatus
classes.docstring: Message delivery status.

classes.docstring: Agent status for A2A communication.

classes.docstring:
Standard A2A message format.

    All agent-to-agent communication uses this format.

classes.name: AgentCapability
classes.docstring:
Agent capability declaration.

    Agents declare their capabilities for discovery and matching.

classes.name: DiscoveryQuery
classes.docstring: Query for discovering agents.

classes.name: DiscoveryResult
classes.docstring: Result of agent discovery.

classes.name: MessageRouter
classes.docstring:
Routes messages between agents and tracks delivery status.

    Responsibilities:
    - Route messages to target agents
    - Track message delivery status
    - Handle retries and failures

classes.name: ExecutionState
classes.docstring: State of a monitored n8n execution.

classes.name: MonitorConfig
classes.docstring:
Configuration for execution monitoring.

    Attributes:
        poll_interval: Initial polling interval in seconds
        max_poll_interval: Maximum polling interval (backoff cap)
        backoff_fa

classes.name: ExecutionProgress
classes.docstring:
Progress update for a monitored execution.

    Attributes:
        execution_id: n8n execution ID
        state: Current execution state
        progress_pct: Progress percentage (0-100), estimated

classes.name: MonitorResult
classes.docstring:
Final result of execution monitoring.

    Attributes:
        execution_id: n8n execution ID
        status: Final execution state
        output_data: Execution output data
        error: Error mess

classes.name: ExecutionMonitor
classes.docstring:
Monitors n8n workflow execution status.

    Polls the n8n API to track execution progress, handles timeouts,
    and provides progress callbacks for real-time updates (e.g., SSE).

Request for n8n bidirectional orchestration.

Result from IPA reasoning phase.

Result of an orchestration request.

classes.docstring: Status of a tool call.

classes.docstring:
Event data for a tool call invocation.

    Passed from L6 to L5 when a tool is invoked during execution.

    Attributes:
        tool_name: Name of the tool being called
        tool_id: Unique

classes.name: ToolResultEvent
classes.docstring:
Event data for a tool call result.

    Passed from L6 to L5 when a tool call completes.

    Attributes:
        tool_name: Name of the tool
        tool_id: Unique identifier matching the ToolC

classes.name: ExecutionRequest
classes.docstring:
Request to execute a task via an execution engine.

        intent: The classified intent/task description
        context: Execution context (session s

classes.name: ExecutionResult
classes.docstring:
Result from an execution engine.

    Returned from L6 to L5.

        content: Response content

classes.name: SwarmEvent
classes.docstring:
Event data for swarm coordination events.

    Used by SwarmCallbackProtocol to communicate swarm state changes.

    Attributes:
        event_type: Type of swarm event
        swarm_id: Swarm i

classes.name: ToolCallbackProtocol
classes.docstring:
Protocol for tool call callbacks.

    Implemented by L5 (orchestration/hybrid) to receive notifications
    from L6 (claude_sdk/agent_framework) about tool call events.

        cla

classes.name: ExecutionEngineProtocol
classes.docstring:
Protocol for execution engines.

    Implemented by L6 (claude_sdk/agent_framework) to provide
    execution capabilities to L5 (orchestration/hybrid).

    Example:
        class ClaudeEngine:

classes.name: OrchestrationCallbackProtocol
classes.docstring:
Protocol for orchestration callbacks.

    Implemented by L5 (orchestration/hybrid) to receive lifecycle
    notifications from L6 execution engines.

classes.name: SwarmCallbackProtocol
classes.docstring:
Protocol for swarm coordination callbacks.

    Implemented by L5 to receive swarm lifecycle events
    from L6 (claude_sdk coordinator).
